message:
perf(curate): use O(1) Map lookups for deduplication

Replace O(n) bullet array scans with pre-computed Map for hash lookups.
Also tracks newly added bullets to catch duplicates within same batch.
Improves performance for large playbooks with many deltas.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
